_description: Verified ApplyDescription $type labels (case-sensitive English UI labels).
_pattern_notes: Some labels are 'human English' that doesn't match the canonical ID's last segment (Store Selection → setselection, Vector Length → length, Boolean Operator → booleanoperator).
Domain-suffix disambiguation works for some namespaced ones: 'Resample Spline' for net.maxon.neutron.geometry.spline.resample.
Add/Sub/Mult/Div/Pow/Abs/Mod don't exist as separate templates — they're absorbed into Arithmetic via the operation port.
'Concatenate' and 'Modulo' are AMBIGUOUS; the error lists candidate canonical IDs but $type doesn't accept canonical IDs directly.
